subcodes.first_line: Thy letter was seen and thy call was hearkened unto, and thy reply hath been sent down from the Most Exalted Pen. Today that which is needful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت دیده شد و ندایت اصغا گشت و جوابت از قلم اعلی نازل الیوم آنچه لازم و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
